text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! All the people who cheered for me have
great big smiles on their faces! Everything's
buono! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? I'd like to hear your opinion, too. What
did you think of my running today?
choice_data_list: You still need a bit more oomph!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yay! You said I was buono! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I'm happy you're smiling, too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You know, the relief I get from seeing you smile...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...It's gone and made me really hungry!
choice_data_list: Let's celebrate with chanko when we get back!
Let's celebrate with chanko when we get back!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ☆ I'm going to eat a whole bunch of food
and then do my best next time, too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Does that mean I didn't do well enough?
choice_data_list:
It means I know you can make even more
people smile!

It means I know you can make even more
people smile!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Of course I can! You just leave it to me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I'm itching to see what I can do! I'm going to make the whole venue into one big pot of smiling chanko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono is brimming with excitement and
more than ready to tackle her next race!
